project_id.description: PostHog project ID; scopes every request to /api/projects/{project_id}/...

api_key.description: PostHog personal API key. Sent as a Bearer token; never logged.

base_url.description: Base PostHog URL. Defaults to PostHog Cloud; override for self-hosted instances or tests.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound sent as the events stream's after filter. Any data before this date will not be replicated.

page_size.description: Records requested per page (sent as the limit query param).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
